collision energy: MS/MS scans were acquired with a normalized collision energy (NCE) of 28%
enrichment method: combined it with the enrichment of detergent (NP-40)-insoluble protein aggregates
fragmentation method: selected for fragmentation by higher-energy collisional dissociation (HCD)
instrument: coupled to a Q Exactive Plus
labeling: native stable isotope labeling by amino acids in cell culture (SILAC)
